chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery

text: 5000 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ زَوَّجَ أَمَتَهُ رَجُلاً ثُمَّ وَقَعَ عَلَيْهَا قَالَ "يُضْرَبُ اَلْحَدَّ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5000 - Hammad narrated from Al-Halabi, who reported from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who married off his slave woman to another man and then had intercourse with her.
Imam (as) said: "He is to be subjected to the legal punishment (Hadd)."
